Appearances: Donald Zimmer, Jr. of King & Spalding telephone number 415-318-1220 for Defendants Bristo-Meyers Squibb Company, Astrazeneca Pharmaceuticals LP and McKesson Corporation.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.
